subject: A masked Saiyan warrior with wild dark spiky hair surging forward in an aggressive combat charge, energy blazing around them
suspected_ip: Masked Saiyan / Bardock under Towa's mask (Dragon Ball Xenoverse)
description: A Saiyan warrior with large wild dark spiky hair lunges forward in a powerful combat charge. The figure wears Saiyan battle armor and has a fierce, intense expression. Orange and gold energy blazes around the figure against a dark background. The body language is fully aggressive — leaning hard into the viewer with one arm reaching forward. The composition is close to mid-shot, with the energy and figure filling most of the frame.
foreground: armored Saiyan warrior with wild spiky dark hair charging forward, energy blazing around them
background: dark energy field, deep black and dark blue
emotion: berserker aggression, full combat charge, intense forward drive
